entries.title: Spy x Family × Animate Cafe Collaboration
entries.access: 2 min walk from Ikebukuro Station East Exit
entries.description: Limited collaboration featuring themed drinks and food inspired by the Forger family. Exclusive merchandise available for visitors.

entries.title: Makima Nendoroid #2045
entries.description: Nendoroid of Makima from Chainsaw Man. Includes 3 face plates, chain accessories, and alternate hand parts.
entries.whereToBuy: Good Smile Online Shop, AmiAmi, CDJapan

entries.title: AnimeJapan 2026
entries.description: Japan's largest anime event featuring studio exhibits, stage events, exclusive merchandise, and industry panels. Over 100 exhibitors expected.
entries.access: Direct access from Kokusai-Tenjijo Station (Rinkai Line)

entries.title: Frieren × Sweets Paradise Collab
entries.description: Themed dessert buffet featuring Frieren characters. All-you-can-eat sweets plus limited collab menu items.

entries.title: Oshi no Ko - Ruby 1/7 Scale Figure
entries.description: 1/7 scale figure of Ruby in her idol costume. Highly detailed sculpt with LED-compatible base.

entries.title: Spring 2026 Anime Season Preview
entries.description: Key titles: Chainsaw Man S2, Dandadan S2, Solo Leveling S3, Blue Box, new original from MAPPA. Full lineup of 40+ new series starting April 2026.

entries.title: Wonder Festival 2026 Summer
entries.description: The world's largest garage kit and figure event. Hundreds of independent creators showcase original figures alongside major manufacturers.

entries.title: Jujutsu Kaisen × Tower Records Cafe
entries.description: Collaboration cafe featuring themed menu items based on Jujutsu Kaisen characters. Limited acrylic stands included with orders.

entries.title: Frieren - Frieren 1/6 Scale
entries.description: Premium 1/6 scale of Frieren casting magic. Translucent magic effect parts included.

entries.title: Brave Punishment (Yuusha-kei ni Shosuru) - Manga Spotlight
entries.description: Rising manga series gaining massive popularity. Unique premise of heroes being punished for saving the world. Currently serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump+.

entries.title: Akihabara UDX Anime Market Spring 2026
entries.description: Pop-up market featuring discounted anime merchandise, exclusive Akihabara-only items, and free photo spots.
entries.access: 1 min from Akihabara Station Electric Town Exit

entries.title: Hatsune Miku NT Ver. Pop Up Parade
entries.description: Affordable Pop Up Parade line figure of Miku in her NT design. Great entry-level collectible.
entries.whereToBuy: Good Smile Online Shop, AmiAmi, Amazon JP
